org.w3c.dom.css/CSSValue/CSS_PRIMITIVE_V.name: CSS_PRIMITIVE_VALUE
org.w3c.dom.css/CSSValue/CSS_PRIMITIVE_V.description:
The value is a primitive value and an instance of theCSSPrimitiveValueinterface can be obtained by using
binding-specific casting methods on this instance of theCSSValueinterface.

The value is a primitive value and an instance of theCSSPrimitiveValueinterface can be obtained by using
binding-specific casting methods on this instance of theCSSValueinterface.

org.w3c.dom.css/CSSPrimitiveValue/CSS_UN.name: CSS_UNKNOWN

org.w3c.dom.css/CSSValue/CSS_VALUE_LIST.name: CSS_VALUE_LIST
